zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy於大約1245年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog51歲，母親Emma de Audley26歲。他和Unknown至少有1個兒子。他去世於1289年在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年45歲，埋葬在威爾士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy于大约1245年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog51岁，母亲Emma de Audley26岁。他和Unknown至少有1个儿子。他去世于1289年在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年45岁，埋葬在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy was born about 1245, in Wales, his father, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, was 51 and his mother, Emma de Audley, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Unknown. He died in 1289, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Wales.

fr.Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy est né environ 1245, à Galles, son père, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Emma de Audley, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Unknown. Il est décédé en 1289, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy um 1245 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog 51 und seine Mutter Emma de Audley 26. Er hatte mit Unknown mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1289 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales begraben.

ht.Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy è nato il circa 1245 nel Galles, il suo padre, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Audley, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Unknown. Morì nel 1289, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwyが約1245年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madogは51歳，母Emma de Audleyは26歳であった。彼はUnknownとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1289年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで45歳で死去し，ウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy(이)가 대략 1245년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Audley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Unknown(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1289년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Audley, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Unknown. Ele faleceu em 1289, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales.

ro.Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Merthyr, Carmarthenshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy родился около 1245 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Emma de Audley, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Unknown. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffydd Fychan ap Gruffydd Lord Glyndwrdwy nació aproximadamente 1245, en Gales, su papá, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Emma de Audley, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Unknown. Murió en 1289, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Gales.
